query: SELECT DISTINCT report_type, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM report_submissions WHERE report_type LIKE '%waste%' OR report_type LIKE '%Waste%' OR report_type LIKE '%leftover%' OR report_type LIKE '%Leftover%' GROUP BY report_type;
